title: lasianthus wardii
intro: Lasianthus wardii, also known as Ward's Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional Chinese herbal preparations, Lasianthus wardii is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat a range of health conditions, including bronchitis and pneumonia.
